name: com.unity.multiplayer.playmode
description: Multiplayer Play Mode is a feature that enables multiple editor instances to be opened simultaneously on the same development device.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed
- Clone editors inconsistently don't transition from launching to launch
- Play Mode Status window has a horizontal scrollbar active at all times even when not needed or the window is fullscreen
- Local instance and editor is still running after cancelling play mode
- Fixed instance status icon showing `loading` after the scenario is cancelled in the scenario status dropdown.

### Changed
- Remote instances are no longer available when using in conjunction with `com.unity.services.multiplayer` version `2.X`
